pageDescription: Calculate board feet for lumber and building materials with precise measurements for woodworking and construction projects

definition.title: Board Foot Definition
definition.description: A board foot is 144 cubic inches of lumber (12" × 12" × 1")

pricing.title: Lumber Pricing
pricing.description: Lumber is typically sold by board foot for hardwoods and by piece for softwoods

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides volume calculations only
criticalWarningsList.accuracy: Measure lumber accurately and account for waste in your projects

importantNotesList: Actual lumber dimensions are often smaller than nominal sizes
Add 15-20% extra for waste and mistakes in woodworking projects
Check lumber grading stamps for quality and species information
Consider moisture content when calculating weight estimates

messages.enterInformation: Enter your lumber dimensions to calculate board feet
messages.resultMessage: Your board foot calculation is shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides board foot calculations based on standard lumber measurement formulas. Actual lumber requirements may vary based on project specifics, waste factors, and supplier recommendations.

seekHelp.title: Lumber Resources
seekHelp.content: For professional lumber advice and project estimation, consult lumber suppliers or woodworking professionals for project-specific recommendations and material selection.

tooltips.quantity: Number of pieces with these dimensions
tooltips.lumberType: Type of lumber affects weight and pricing

a_board_foot_is_a_unit_of_measurement_fo:
A board foot is a unit of measurement for lumber volume. One board foot equals 144 cubic inches or
                    1/12 cubic foot. It's calculated by multiplying thickness (inches) × width (inches) × length (feet)
                    ÷ 12.
number_of_pieces_bf_per_piece_26: Number of pieces × BF per piece
a_2_6_8_board_8_6_2_12_8_board_feet_for_:
A 2" × 6" × 8' board = (8 × 6 × 2) ÷ 12 = 8 board feet. For 10 pieces,
                      total = 80 board feet.
cost_per_board_foot_for_total_price_calc: Cost per board foot for total price calculation
